evals.prompt: Build an onboarding pack for Sarah, joining as a senior software engineer on the order-platform team.
evals.expected_output: A curated reading order: playbooks, domains, the order-platform overview, key ADRs and specs the engineer should read first; structured for first-week consumption.

evals.prompt: New PM joining — make an onboarding pack for the auth-service project.
evals.expected_output: Role-tailored pack: strategy docs, project briefs, decision log relevant to PMs.

evals.prompt: Designer onboarding — they're joining the platform team.
evals.expected_output: Designer-tailored pack emphasizing design pages, approach docs, and visual artifacts.
